ddt:Target.Name: ME17.920_7000_620_V2.0
ddt:Target.Description:
Applications: XFD, XFB, XFF Moteurs: M4R, H4M, H4Mkminus; ECU: ME17.920 Logiciels: 7000_100, 7000_200, 7000_300, 7000_400, 7000_5xx, 7000_6xx ----------------------------------- Auteur: Daniel MARCUTA ----------------------------------- Documents de référence: DID (RENAULT) : a_dg_dgt_dat_msgdia2_xxx_xx_x(49.0) DTC : Import from LM44; Base de depart : ME17.920_7000_600_V01 Base transverse utilsé import DIDs : LM36.02 Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1639 ----------------------------------- Historique: -------------- ME17.920_7000_620_V2.0 (CDI) -Corrected DID_$285F
ME17_7000_620_V1.0 (AJO) -Added Auto-ident 7000_540 / 620 VDiag $44
ME17_7000_610_V01 (DMA)
- Added Auto Identification for 7000_610 (VDiag $44) - Added Renault DIDs: $20B2 $20B3 $20DC $20DD $20DE $20E0 $20E1 $20E8 $2C57 $2C58 $2C59 $2C5B $2C5C $2C5D $2C80 $2C9B $2D80 - Added all DTCs from LM 44
ME17_7000_510_V04-->ME17_7000_600_V01
-Added Auto Identification for 7000_600(VDiags $44 and $47) -Added RSA DIDs: $20D6, $2297, $251C, $2534, $28FD, $28FE, $28FF, $F454, $F63D -Modified definiton for SUPPLIER DIDs:$FEE5, $FEE9 -Added screen <<Bench Modes KOBD2-EU6 V1.0>> -Updated description for states 2&3 from DID $22BE
------------------ V04(ABU): - Added "Adaptatifs de richesse - Sonde proportionnelle" screen to "Réinit & réécriture des apprentissages"; - Added Renault DIDs ($215B, $21A3) to OBD End Of Line screen; - Corrected data for Renault DID $204E.
V03(ABU): - Updated Cata/Sonde O2 Diag for EU6 in screens "OBD_End_Of_Line" and "Diag Misfire, Apprentissages, Diag Cata, SO²(0)" - Updated the display order of information for DID_$F808
V02: - Added screens: 'Homologation : mode banc sonde amont' 'Homologation : Misfire' --> the DIDs that are present in this screen are introduced from LM38 - updated DTC list - LM40_V04 - updated DIDs definition: $F406, $F407
V01: - new supplier I/O Controls added for Spark Plugs($FEE5) and Injectors($FEE9) - added screen ''FSL'' in '' Lecture & Ecriture'' - updated DTC list - LM39 - added in auto ident 7000_510
------------------------------------------------------------------------ ME17.920_7000_500_V01 ------------------------------------------------------ Auteur: Cosmin Ghigeanu
Base de depart : ME17.920_7000_400_V01
V01 - Added Auto-ident: 68 ($44) "Robert Bosch GmbH, VAT ID No DE811128135, Supplier No 037" "7000" "5000" - Added Supplier DID FD81 - Evol Supplier DIDs: FD03 FD0E FD1A FD1D FD21 FD24 FD27 FD29 FD79 FD7A FD7B FD7C FD7D FD7E - Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1508 ##### I/O & RC updates ##### - new I/O requests and screens for UDS (added "Start/Stop I/O Control by DID ($2F)") - updated routine list ##### AUTO-IDENT updates ##### - Reduce data size for $F18A from 64 bytes to 57 bytes - Reduce data size for $F194 from 32 bytes to 4 bytes - Reduce data size for $F195 from 32 bytes to 4 bytes
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- OLDER VERSION ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- V01 (ME17.920_7000_400_V01): - Added vehicle XFF - Removed Renault R5 ident - Removed Conti IO DIDs - Added Supplier DIDs: FD7A FD7B FD7C FD7D FD7E FD7F FEE0 FEE5 FEE9 - Evoluated Supplier DIDs: FD03 FD59 FD79 FD80 - Added Auto-ident: 68 ($44) "Robert Bosch GmbH, VAT ID No DE811128135, Supplier No 037" "7000" "4000" - Items_Bases_DDT2000_S1502
V01 (ME17.920_7000_300_V01): - Added auto-ident: Vdiag $44 - 7000_300 - Added DIDs Renault: $20A5 $20AD $20C3 $20C4 $20C6 $20C8 $20C9 $20CA $20CB $20D3 $20D4 $20D5 $2181 $F111 $F121 $F150 $F151 $F153 $F155 $F453 $F6E8 $F810 - Added DIDs Supplier: $FD75 $FD76 $FD77 $FD78 $FD79 $FD80 $FD81 $FD82 $FD83 $FD84 $FD85 $FD03 - Modified DIDs: $2299 passed in RW (starting LM33) - Updated list of DTCs

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: OutputPermanentControlList

Data.Description:
Definition of IOControl

Data: IOCTL.DataIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all IO devices that may be
  controlled by InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
 
    0 - DID_Pump
    1 - DID_Wiper

If some of these IO devices have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the IO devices followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: DID_Wiper.Mode
     Type: List
       0 - Slow speed
       1 - High speed

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the InputOutpuControl request, after the IOCTL.OptionRecord.Parameter data.

Screen.Name: !!!! A lire avant d'utiliser les écrans !!!!

Label.Text: Ces valeurs doivent être saisies manuellement avant d'être réécrites.
- Le bouton "REINITIALISATION" permet d'écrire les valeurs d'initialisation d'un composant suite au changement de celui-ci.
Les valeurs seront automatiquement initialisées lors de l'appui du bouton, aucune saisie n'est nécessaire.
Dans les écrans suivants vous trouverez deux boutons: Ecriture et Réinitialisation.
- Après une reprogrammation ou changement d'un calculateur le bouton "ECRITURE" permet de réécrire les valeurs précédemment sauvegardées.

Label.Text: Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
Danc ce cas le calculateur est déprotégé et n'interdit pas le démarrage moteur
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car il ne reçoit pas les trames de la BCM: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est protégé car la BCM ne répond pas correctement: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'a pas authentifié la clé ou le badge
-> L'ECM n'est pas monté sur le véhicule sur lequel il a appris le code
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est vierge et protégé car la BCM n'envoie pas la clé secrète: l'ECM n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> La BCM n'est pas autorisée à envoyer la clé secrète
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM
Immobilizer - engine not running due to BCM in secure mode
Immobilizer - engine not running due to no BCM authorisation
Immobilizer - engine not running due to a CAN network problem with the BCM
L'ECM est "autoprotégé" et n'autorise pas le démarrage moteur.
-> L'ECM a subit une tentative "d'intrusion" ou a détécté une erreur interne (EEPROM, FLASH...)

DATABYTE D, BIT 7: EGR system monitoring
BIT 3: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')
BIT 7: Reserved (bit shall be reported as '0')

Test not complete = 1 soit diag non joué
